goal: Ship `huuma skills update [NAMES...] [--force]` that re-fetches each tracked skill from the GitHub `ref` recorded in `.agents/skills/.manifest.json` and updates the on-disk copy when upstream has moved. Untracked skills are skipped. Locally edited tracked skills are not overwritten without `--force`. Per-skill best-effort with a summary line and exit code 1 on any failure/refusal.

status_legend.blocked: waiting on a dependency or a user decision
status_legend.done: implemented and verified per the `verify` command

tasks.title: Implement `src/skills/update.ts` orchestrator + subcommand
tasks.summary: Create the update orchestrator (`updateSkills`) and subcommand entry point (default export). Reuses existing leaf modules: manifest, path, extract, fetch, validate, fs_utils (plus a local `safeRemove`, since fs_utils does not export one). Per-skill best-effort over `(trackedName, entry)`: missing-on-disk check, locally-edited check (refuse without --force), fetch (labelled `fetch failed (...)`) + extract (threading `entry.source.subpath`), read upstream name and refuse if it differs from trackedName (rename), already-current check, validate (refuse on genuine upstream regression), swap into the existing `<trackedName>/` slot, record updated entry. Keep `trackedName` (manifest key) and the re-read `upstreamName` distinct — do not conflate into one `name` variable. Orchestrator short-circuits with `No tracked skills to update.` (exit 0) on an empty manifest with no names. One manifest write per run. Summary line + exit code. Test seams: fetch + log + cwd.
tasks.verify: deno check src/skills/update.ts passes; updateSkills and updateHelp are importable. Behavioural verification is T2.

tasks.title: Write `src/skills/update_test.ts`
tasks.summary: Mirror install_test.ts + bundle_test.ts style — in-memory tarballs via TarStream, temp cwd, cleanup in finally. Cover all 14 per-skill outcome cases from the ADR: already current, updated, locally-edited (with/without --force), locally-edited but already-current upstream (with/without --force), fetch failure, upstream validation regression, upstream name change (re-fetched name != tracked name), missing on disk, untracked name on CLI, mixed run, no-op-only run, --force with nothing to discard, empty registry. Build tarballs as uncompressed TarStreams (the fetch seam returns already-decompressed bytes); compute already-current `contentHash` fixtures via `contentHashOf`, not hard-coded strings. Assert summary counts, sorted-by-name order, exit codes, manifest write/no-write semantics.
tasks.verify: deno test src/skills/update_test.ts passes; no stray .tmp-/.old- dirs after any test; temp cwd cleaned in finally.

tasks.title: Register `update` in `src/skills/skills.ts`
tasks.summary: Import update from ./update.ts and register it in the Registry as ["update"] with a description. The skillsHelp() output automatically picks it up via registry.all(). No short alias.
tasks.verify: deno check src/skills/skills.ts passes; deno run -A src/mod.ts skills --help shows update in the sub-command list; deno run -A src/mod.ts skills update --help shows the update usage text.

tasks.title: README: `### Updating skills` subsection
tasks.summary: Add a `### Updating skills` subsection within the existing `## Skills` section, after the `huuma skills add` documentation. Document the command surface (positional names optional, --force), per-skill outcomes (up to date, updated, refused, failed), exit code policy, and examples. Independent of code; can land any time but logically last.
tasks.verify: Visual review; deno task test still green.

tasks.title: Final validation
tasks.summary: Whole-tree type-check, full test suite, and manual smoke runs covering the happy path (all up to date), the update path (upstream moved), the refusal path (local edits without --force), the --force path, the untracked-name path, and the empty-registry path.
tasks.verify: deno task check passes; deno task test passes (existing skills tests stay green); manual smoke runs behave as described in PLAN.md §Final validation.

final_validation: deno task check — type-check the whole tree including update.ts and modified skills.ts.
deno task test — full suite; update_test.ts runs offline; existing skills tests stay green.
Manual: huuma skills update → per-skill … Checking + ✓ lines + Summary:.
Manual: edit a tracked skill's SKILL.md, re-run → ✖ refused; re-run with --force → ⚠ overwriting + ✓ updated.
Manual: huuma skills update nonexistent → ✖ not tracked; nothing to update, exit 1.
Manual: huuma skills update on an empty registry → No tracked skills to update., exit 0.
huuma skills --help shows update in the sub-command list.
huuma skills update --help shows the usage text.
out_of_scope: --dry-run (deferred to a future huuma skills status/outdated)
resolvedSha manifest field + GitHub REST tip-SHA comparison
Private-repo auth, non-GitHub sources, /-containing refs — inherited from ADR 0001
